MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel City View Restaurant, Inc. To Produce Further Responses And Documents
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. G. RYAN PATRICK, Esq. of Wiegel Law Group, PLC (Tel: 415-552-8230) for plaintiffs/cross-defendants John Yee, B&M Mei Sing Restaurant, Inc., City View Restaurant, Inc., and Vincent Chan.
Atty. BRYAN S. SILVERMAN, Esq. of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP (Tel: 415-981-0550) for defendant/cross-complainant Au Electric Corporation dba AEC Alarms.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AU ELECTRIC CORPORATION's Motion To Compel City View Restaurant, Inc. To Produce Further Responses And Documents.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications, as follows:

Motion granted. Due to the upcoming trial date of October 25, 2021, the supplemental responses shall be served by October 21, 2021 at 5 p.m. If the Presiding Judge grants a trial continuance, the supplemental responses shall be served by November 9, 2021 at 5:00 p.m. Sanctions of $250 awarded to Defendants payable by Plaintiff's prior counsel.

Counsel for defendant/cross-complainant is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com (cc'ing opposing counsel).

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
